headline: Which S&P500 stocks are moving after the closing bell on Thursday?

headline: Applied Materials (AMAT) Jumps On TSMC Expansion As Fair Value Debate Stays Open
summary: Applied Materials (AMAT) moved into focus after its stock jumped 7.7% following Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing's planned chip price increases and a US$100b Arizona expansion, which underscored long-term equipment demand linked to AI infrastructure. See our latest analysis for Applied Materials. That jump sits against a strong run for Applied Materials, with the share price up 37.14% over the past 90 days and 106.02% year to date, contributing to a 1-year total shareholder return of...

headline: Applied Materials to Report Fiscal Third Quarter 2026 Results on Aug. 13, 2026
summary: SANTA CLARA, Calif., July 23, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Applied Materials, Inc. today announced that it will hold its fiscal third quarter 2026 earnings conference call on Thursday, Aug. 13, 2026, at 4:30 p.m. ET / 1:30 p.m. PT. The call will be webcast live at: https://ir.appliedmaterials.com. A replay will be available on the same day by 8:00 p.m. ET / 5:00 p.m. PT. About Applied MaterialsApplied Materials, Inc.
